title: Exclusivo Mezcla Fleece Throw Blanket Extra Large, Super Soft and Warm Blankets for Couch, Sofa and Bed Waffle Textured, Cozy, Fuzzy and Lightweight, Mixed Dusty Pink, 127x178 CM
features: Soft and Cozy: Made from premium and plush fabric, this blanket feels gentle against your skin, offering a cozy and soothing touch
Lightweight and Warm: Despite its lightweight design, the flannel material traps heat effectively, keeping you warm without feeling heavy
Unique Design: The waffle jacquard pattern adds a stylish and elegant touch, making this blanket a standout piece in any room
Multiple Uses: Versatile for different needs, including as a warm throw for the couch, a stylish bedspread, or a cozy addition to any living space
Easy Care: Machine washable and fade resistant, this throw blanket is easy to maintain, keeping its beauty and softness, even after repeated washes
